specific_question: How many MediConn virtual healthcare platform staff had multi-factor authentication (MFA) verified by the cybersecurity specialist between January 1 and June 30, 2025?
answer: The cybersecurity specialist verified MFA for all 215 staff members on MediConn’s virtual healthcare platform in Q1, 2025.
dr_question: In 2026, how can MediConn Solutions defend its virtual healthcare platform against coordinated ransomware attacks facilitated by foreign nation-state cyber threat actors, ensuring uninterrupted access to clinical systems and patient safety?
